ROOM 503A, JUDGE PRO TEM MARY FORAN, MARIE TORREANO, CSR, PNATT/CLERK. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT WITH COUNSEL. CASE SETTLED, TERMS PUT ON THE RECORD. IF DEFT. VACATES THE PREMISES BY 5PM AT 8/31/00, PLTF WILL FILE A DISMISSAL WITH THE COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENRIQUEZ, PROSPERO ENRIQUEZ, JOCELYN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 58 RONDELL #6 S.F. $5,575.78 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,575.78, LEASE FORFEITED, ($2573.35 AS BACK RENT AND $3002.43 AS PER DIEM DAMAGES)
